meta.name: description
meta.content: Enterprise-grade Vedic astrology platform by VastuCart. Decode your Kundali with precision.

svg.class: lucide lucide-loader-circle mx-auto h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-[var(--color-primary-base)]

div.style: background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(254,250,243,.97) 0%, rgba(253,248,240,.92) 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(1,63,71,.06);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(1,63,71,.03)

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-white flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0

button.class: hidden sm:flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-semibold transition-colors hover:bg-[rgba(1,63,71,0.04)]

a.class: hidden sm:flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:shadow-lg

button.class: relative p-2 rounded-xl transition-colors hover:bg-[rgba(1,63,71,0.04)]

span.class: absolute top-1.5 right-1.5 w-2 h-2 rounded-full

button.class: lg:hidden p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-[rgba(1,63,71,0.04)]
inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 hover:bg-white/[.08] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-400/40

button.title: View reports
button.class: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 sm:px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-white/65 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/[.07] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/20

button.title: Ask AI Guru
button.class: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 sm:px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-white/65 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/[.07] transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/20
inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 sm:px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-400/50 hover:shadow-lg hover:scale-[1.02] flex-shrink-0

aside.class: fixed lg:sticky inset-y-0 lg:inset-y-auto left-0 lg:top-[92px] h-screen lg:h-[calc(100vh-92px)] z-40 w-64 overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 transform lg:transform-none transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0

button.class: absolute top-4 right-4 p-1.5 rounded-lg z-10 lg:hidden text-stone-400 hover:text-stone-600 hover:bg-stone-100

div.class: bg-white dark:bg-stone-800 rounded-2xl shadow-md border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-700 p-8 text-center
w-16 h-16 mx-auto mb-4 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-500 to-amber-600 flex items-center justify-center

h1.class: text-2xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-white font-heading mb-2

div.p: This section is under construction. The full Sitemap.xml experience with real API data, charts, and interactive features is being built.

div.class: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-700 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium

aside.class: hidden xl:block xl:sticky xl:top-[92px] xl:h-[calc(100vh-92px)] w-80 flex-shrink-0 overflow-y-auto

a.class: flex items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-lg

nav.class: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 border-t px-2 py-2 pb-safe z-50 md:hidden

button.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#02A2A4] rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:text-[#013f47] dark:hover:text-[#02A2A4]

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all

button.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#02A2A4] rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:text-[#013f47] dark:hover:text-[#02A2A4]

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all

button.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#02A2A4] rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:text-[#013f47] dark:hover:text-[#02A2A4]

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all

button.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#02A2A4] rounded-lg text-stone-500 hover:text-[#013f47] dark:hover:text-[#02A2A4]

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all

button.class: flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 text-stone-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500 rounded-lg

div.class: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-400 to-amber-500 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-amber-500/30
w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-white p-0 border border-white/20 shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden

div.p: Your trusted companion for Vedic astrology insights, personalized kundali analysis, and authentic remedies.

a.class: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

button.class: text-sm text-stone-300 hover:text-amber-400 transition-colors
text-sm text-stone-300 hover:text-amber-400 transition-colors
text-sm text-stone-300 hover:text-amber-400 transition-colors
text-sm text-stone-300 hover:text-white transition-colors
text-sm text-stone-300 hover:text-white transition-colors
text-sm text-stone-300 hover:text-white transition-colors

div.class: mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-white/10 flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4
div.p: © 2026 Kundali Decoded by VastuCart. All rights reserved.

div.class: w-full px-2.5 pt-2.5 pb-2 text-left group cursor-pointer
relative w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white flex-shrink-0
flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mt-2 pt-2

span.class: text-[9px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg uppercase tracking-wider

button.class: text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg text-white hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity

div.class: flex items-center gap-2 px-2 pt-4 pb-2

button.class: w-full flex items-center gap-2.5 text-left transition-all duration-150 rounded-[10px]
